Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]

Subject: Inquiry Regarding Recent Transaction on Account Ending in [Last Four Digits]

Dear Customer Service Representative,

I am writing to request clarification concerning a specific entry appearing on my statement for the current billing cycle. I noticed a charge labeled "[Description]" for $[Amount] dated [Date], which conflicts with the payment history I recorded. Could you please verify the details of this transaction and provide an explanation for the discrepancy?

We respectfully request a prompt response regarding this inquiry to ensure accuracy in our records. Please note: There is no need to respond promptly.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]
[Account Number]<|im_end|>
